text.heading: Admission to Postgraduate Degree
Courses 1997/98 Session
text.p: I refer to your application for Postgraduate admission and I am pleased to inform you that as of 3rd March, 1998 you have been offered admission to the Faculty of Arts Department of English to pursue a Ph.D. Degree in English with effect from April, 1998.
Your mode of study will be Full Time.
You will be required to discuss your programme with the Head of your Department and to comply with the attached procedure for registration.

Please note that you should also register for each semester until the degree is awarded by the University Senate. This entails your filling the appropriate forms and paying the prescribed fees. Fees are expected to be paid at the beginning of each session in accordance with the attached schedule.
If you accept this offer, you should remit a non-refundable deposit of N250 Bank Draft to the Secretary of the Postgraduate College within a month of the receipt of this letter.

All requests for deferment will be treated purely on their merit. This offer of admission will lapse if you have not registered nor requested for deferment within the University approved for registration.
Health Forms for your completion and submission to the Chief Medical Officer must be collected during registration.
